examples: Were you serious, or was that a bit of tomfoolery?
And then, incapable of singing, [...] he delights himself with tomfoolery.
All came in and all were consumed in secret orgies of cracker-related tomfoolery.
With its virtuoso tomfoolery, "Fantastic Mr. Fox" is like a homegrown Wallace and Gromit caper.
Over the last couple of years, states have grown more dependent than ever on budget tomfoolery as they have faced record deficits.
